descriptions.dishRepairs: Fix weak TV signal, receiver issues, and channel order.
descriptions.dishInstallations: Install your dish; service includes extending cables.
descriptions.hangTv: Hang your TV on the wall.
descriptions.acMaintenanceCleaning: Clean the filter and measure Freon charge. Prices are per AC unit.
descriptions.acLeakingWater: Includes internal and external units and changing the drain hose.
descriptions.acNotCooling: Repair AC cooling issues, flares, and Freon leaks.
descriptions.carpetCleaning: Deep clean carpets to remove dirt and odors.
descriptions.fridgeLoudNoises: Identify and fix unusual or loud noises during operation.
descriptions.thermostatReplacement: Replace a defective thermostat to restore temperature control.
descriptions.fridgeWaterLeakage: Fix leaks caused by a clogged drain, broken pipe, or seal issues.
descriptions.ovenDoorNotClosing: Fix loose hinges or worn seals causing heat leakage.
descriptions.ovenNotHeating: Repair heating failure due to a faulty element, thermostat, or wiring.
descriptions.weakOvenHeat: Fix low or inconsistent heating affecting cooking performance.
descriptions.wallPaintPeeling: Fix damaged or peeling paint and repaint affected areas.
descriptions.doorPainting: Repaint doors with lacquer or oil paint.
descriptions.fullRoomPainting: Complete painting for a room, including walls and ceiling basic finish.
descriptions.toiletNotFlushing: Fix weak or non-working flush systems.
descriptions.toiletLeakage: Repair water leaks from the toilet base or tank.
descriptions.lowWaterPressure: Diagnose and fix weak water flow issues.
descriptions.fanNotSpinning: Repair motor or capacitor issues preventing rotation.
descriptions.fanMakingNoise: Fix rattling or grinding sounds by tightening or lubricating parts.
descriptions.fanCleaning: Clean blades and internal parts for better performance.
descriptions.customShelvesCabinets: Build or install shelves and cabinets.
descriptions.electricalWiring: Diagnose and repair faulty wiring or circuits.
descriptions.powerOutlets: Install new outlets or fix damaged ones.
descriptions.lightingInstallationRepair: Install or repair indoor and outdoor lighting.
